title: 6 Logging in to OLT and Setting up Email Notifications
body_text:
6	Logging in to OLT and Setting up Email Notifications
6.1	Overview of Logging in to OLT
To access OLT you must have a Client Centre username assigned with access to OLT (either as a CPS Admin Security Officer or as a Client Centre User). See the CPS Admin Application Part for procedures on creating CPS Admin Security Officers and Client Centre Users.
6.2	Logging in to OLT
To log in to OLT:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 1.
Note: 	Youâll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if itâs your first login to the Client Centre, youâve deleted your cookies, or youâre using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 1: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
OLT (Online Tracing System)
. See Figure 3.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If youâve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under âMy Favouritesâ.
Figure 3: Accessing OLT
Caution
:	Always log off and close the browser when you step away from your desk or when you are finished using the system.
6.3	Setting Up Automatic Trace Notifications on OLT
Financial institutions can be notified of new trace requests and changes to trace requests by email. The email notification feature can be enabled or disabled by branch.
A Tracer or SuperTracer proceeds as follows to enable or disable OLT email notifications:
Note:	Tracers or SuperTracers can only update the OLT notification setting for their own branch.
Log in to OLT, as described in Section 6.2, Logging in to OLT.
Select
Settings
. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Accessing OLT Settings
Enter an email address in the E-mail field. If this field is blank, the notification feature isnât enabled. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Email Notification
Note:	Since only one email address can be entered per branch, it is recommended that you enter a group email address. If a Tracer or SuperTracer from each branch enters a group email address that is specific to their branch, members of each email group are only notified of traces that pertain to their branch. If a Tracer or SuperTracer from each branch enters the same email address as the other branches, members of that email group will be notified of traces for all branches.
Select
Update
.
END
